properties.titulo_evento: Kyiv’s drone leverage moved the US. Moscow could be next, a top Ukrainian official says.
properties.descricao: After years of needing Western weapons, Kyiv is approaching negotiations with battlefield tech the U.S. now wants — and a possible ceasefire looming.

properties.titulo_evento: US couldn’t repair battle-damaged ships in war with China, study finds
properties.descricao: Battle-damaged U.S. warships could not be quickly repaired and returned to combat during a war with China, according to a new study by RAND.

properties.titulo_evento: Can China’s latest air-to-air missile take on its US equivalent? Definitely maybe, experts say.
properties.descricao: The PL-16’s specs would let it chase large, slower-moving aircraft, one analyst said, though its effectiveness against smaller, faster planes is unclear.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine launches ‘TrophyLab’ platform to share captured Russian weapons with allies
properties.descricao: Among the listed items available for study are, for example, a Kinzhal hypersonic missile and a T-90M tank.

properties.titulo_evento: Is There a Place in Ukrainian Media for War Skeptics?

properties.titulo_evento: Too Big To Break Again: India, Italy, and the Defense Partnership That Almost Wasn’t
properties.descricao: A single bribe nearly ruined a defense partnership most people didn’t know even existed. It took India and Italy almost a decade to recover.The story of how that rupture happened — and what it exposed about Italy’s quiet but deep...

properties.titulo_evento: Palestinian children ‘unprotected’ as NGOs forced out of Gaza and West Bank
properties.descricao: Israel is pushing humanitarian groups and rights defenders to scale down operations in occupied Palestinian territories.

properties.titulo_evento: A leftward lurch? What to know about the Democratic primaries in New York
properties.descricao: Democratic socialist candidates push for an edge in US races that hinge on issues like Israel policy and inequality.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon discusses ‘deconfliction’ mechanism ahead of Israel talks
properties.descricao: Mediators Qatar and Pakistan say plan seeks to ensure the end of military operations in Lebanon.

properties.titulo_evento: Will a US-Iran deal transform the Iranian economy?
properties.descricao: A US-Iran deal could unlock frozen assets, oil exports, and investment, reshaping Iran's economic future.

properties.titulo_evento: US eases oil sanctions as Iran denies Vance claim on nuclear inspectors
properties.descricao: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
properties.descricao: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

properties.titulo_evento: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
properties.descricao: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows
properties.descricao: Abelardo de la Espriella appears to have narrowly defeated his rival Iván Cepeda, who says the preliminary count is "not yet official or binding".

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says repairs to algae-plagued Reflecting Pool will begin immediately
properties.descricao: Despite a multi-million dollar renovation, the Washington DC landmark has peeling paint and algae. Trump claims vandals are partly to blame.

properties.titulo_evento: Romania parliament rejects liberal PM-designate Adrian Vestea
properties.descricao: Romania's parliament rejected prime minister-designate Adrian Vestea on Monday, extending months of political turmoil in the EU and NATO member bordering Ukraine and raising the prospect of a snap election if a second government nominee also fails t...

properties.titulo_evento: Fact check: AI fakes around the World Cup spread political narratives
properties.descricao: Keir Starmer in a Croatia jersey. An Iranian protest against a US strike. Calls to arrest Brazil's President Lula. Adolf Hitler in the German fan section — all supposedly seen at the World Cup. But none of it is real.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran-US talks to end war beset by tension, mistrust
properties.descricao: While both sides claim "encouraging progress," experts say there's a long way to go to turn the shaky diplomatic framework into a durable agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran deal: Pakistan's diplomatic masterstroke?
properties.descricao: By stepping in as mediator in the Iran war, Pakistan has managed to elevate its status from a regional player to a global diplomatic stakeholder — with a little help from China and its friends in the Gulf.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Bulgaria threatening to veto EU's Russia sanctions?
properties.descricao: Bulgarian PM Rumen Radev has vowed to veto the EU's latest sanctions against Russia because they include Russian Orthodox Patriarch Kirill and former Lukoil president Vagit Alekperov. What's behind his opposition?

properties.titulo_evento: US waives Iran oil sanctions citing progress in talks
properties.descricao: US officials have cited ongoing negotiations on allowing nuclear inspections and opening the Strait of Hormuz in pausing sanctions for 60 days. JD Vance said a "foundation" is in place for a final deal. More on DW.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran talks end in Switzerland, mediators say
properties.descricao: According to mediators from Qatar and Pakistan, the talks between United States and Iranian officials in Switzerland have ended with both sides agreeing on a roadmap. Technical talks will continue.

properties.titulo_evento: Deniz Undav: Germany's 2026 World Cup supersub
properties.descricao: With three goals in two games, striker Deniz Undav is the man in focus for Germany at the World Cup. But things could have turned out very differently for the Stuttgart striker.

properties.titulo_evento: UK's Starmer mulls 'political realities' after Burnham by-election
properties.descricao: A member of UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Cabinet said it would be "delusional" to pretend there was no threat to his position. But he also said he had no information suggesting he might quit, as a newspaper reported.

properties.titulo_evento: UK left in limbo as Starmer faces his lame duck era
properties.descricao: The transition period includes a high-stakes NATO summit. One key EU meeting has already been postponed.

properties.titulo_evento: Tusk accuses president of medal blunder as Poland seeks to keep influence in Ukraine war
properties.descricao: "A mistake is worse than a crime," said Tusk of President Karol Nawrocki's move to strip Zelenskyy of the country's top honor.

properties.titulo_evento: EU-UK summit postponed as Keir Starmer resigns
properties.descricao: The meeting was meant to take place on July 22 to conclude talks on an agrifood agreement, an emissions trading deal, and a youth mobility scheme.

properties.titulo_evento: China Tightens Rare-Earth Grip on U.S. Firms, Threatening Trade Clash
properties.descricao: The move targets two U.S. manufacturers at the center of the Trump administration’s effort to rebuild the domestic supply chain for critical magnets.

properties.descricao: Oil prices retreated after Iran’s foreign minister said there had been “major progress” toward ending the fighting in Lebanon during the first session of high-level talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Rises Amid Uncertainty Over Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Modest reactions in the oil and financial markets as Iran and the U.S. met in Switzerland for a first round of talks aimed at making a temporary cease-fire permanent.

properties.titulo_evento: While the World Scrambles for Oil, China Sits on Full Tanks
properties.descricao: The possible reopening of the Strait of Hormuz may not prompt China to return quickly to prewar levels of oil purchases from the Persian Gulf.
